steps.title: Track the example relationship
steps.content: The first sentence gives the broad classification system: Shakespeare's plays are grouped as comedies, histories, or tragedies. The next sentence names specific plays and their genres, so the transition should show that these plays illustrate the system.

steps.title: Reject nonexample transitions
steps.content: Choice A signals an added separate point, but the sentence gives an illustration. Choice B signals similarity, though no comparison is being made. Choice D signals contrast, but the examples support the classification system. The answer is C.
